name: parkfornightgooglemaps
description: A modern PWA for finding and sharing parking spots with Google Maps integration

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix client install
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix client run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix server run build && npm --prefix client run build
scripts.test: npm --prefix server test && npm --prefix client test
scripts.lint: npm --prefix server run lint && npm --prefix client run lint

author: n00b001
